name: spacefast
description: Spacefast publishes files and folders to the web instantly. Permanent URLs, immutable versions, anonymous publish with a claim link.

interface.shortDescription: Publish files and folders to the web instantly.
interface.longDescription: Spacefast is the static host where AI-made things are kept. Publish any file or folder and get a permanent URL, an immutable version URL, and — for anonymous publishes — a one-time claim link. Supports custom domains, passwords, version history, rollback, logs, signed uploads, and On-Device MCP workspace tools.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Spacefast to publish this project, share the live URL, and include the anonymous claim link if the publish is unclaimed.
